name: Zootia Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Raw-material production, herding, and harvest logistics ride the Principalities calendar but feel more seasonal than courtly
feast_days: Harvest celebrations and production milestones shape the public year
legal_deadlines: Measures, distribution, and contract fulfillment matter most near harvest peaks
shipping_windows: Outbound raw-material movement depends on road and market timing
weather_expectations: Yield expectations matter more than pageantry
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Renewal is practical, tied to herd health, field recovery, and communal supply continuity
public_language_about_time: People speak in cut, shear, herd, and harvest windows
